name: Wireless Mouse
description: Ergonomic 2.4GHz wireless optical mouse with adjustable DPI settings (800/1200/1600), silent clicks, and an ultra-durable build. Perfect for home, office, and travel.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: Tactile blue-switch mechanical gaming keyboard with stunning RGB backlit effects, full anti-ghosting keys, and an aluminum frame for absolute typing comfort.

name: Bluetooth Speaker
description: Portable wireless speaker featuring deep bass, crisp high notes, IPX7 waterproof rating, and a 12-hour continuous battery life to keep your music going anywhere.

name: USB-C Hub
description: Multiport adapter sporting a 4K HDMI video output, 3 USB 3.0 ports, SD/MicroSD card readers, and 100W Power Delivery. Perfect expansion for modern ultrabooks.

name: Laptop Stand
description: Adjustable aluminum laptop riser with ergonomic design. Six height levels improve posture and facilitate cooling, supporting all laptops up to 15.6 inches.

name: Smart Watch
description: Premium health tracker featuring real-time heart monitoring, custom fitness modes, sleep analyzer, notifications, and a full-touch vibrant HD display screen.

name: Headphones
description: Over-ear active noise cancelling headphones with rich hi-fi sound, memory foam cushion earcups, and a wireless battery runtime extending past 30 hours.

name: Power Bank
description: 20000mAh high-capacity external battery pack with dual USB quick-charging outputs and intelligent safety protections against short circuits and surges.

name: Gaming Mouse Pad
description: Extended large desk mousepad featuring stitched anti-fray borders, water-resistant micro-woven top cloth surface, and non-slip rubberized grip bottom.

name: Webcam
description: Full HD 1080p desktop camera with auto light correction, dual stereo noise-reducing microphones, and a broad wide-angle focus lens for webinars and streaming.

name: SSD 512GB
description: Ultra-fast NVMe M.2 PCIe internal solid-state drive. Delivers read speeds up to 3500MB/s for blistering load velocities and professional workflow enhancements.

name: Monitor 24-inch
description: Borderless IPS desktop display panel with full HD 1920x1080 resolution, fluid 75Hz refresh speed, blue light reduction filter, and versatile HDMI/VGA connections.

name: Portable Hard Drive
description: 2TB compact external mobile hard drive offering high-speed USB 3.0 interfaces, quick plug-and-play capability, and resilient drop shock-resistant casing.

name: Wireless Earbuds
description: True wireless stereo earbuds supporting Bluetooth 5.3, instantaneous auto-pairing, sweatproof resistance, and an elegant pocket-sized LED battery case.

name: Office Chair
description: Premium ergonomic high-back mesh office desk seat featuring breathable lumbar alignment adjustments, padded 3D armrests, and dynamic height hydraulic tilt.
